choose.when: SELECT b.id as equipment_ID, b.Substation_ID as value FROM ies_ms.breaker_b b join ies_ms.feeder_b f on b.feeder_id = f.id join ies_ms.subcontrolarea_b sa on f.subcontrolarea_id = sa.id join ies_ms.company_b c on sa.company_id = c.id WHERE b.id = #{equipment_ID} and c.id = #{companyID} and b.Substation_ID != 0

SELECT b.id as equipment_ID, b.Substation_ID as value FROM ies_ms.disconnector_b b join ies_ms.feeder_b f on b.feeder_id = f.id join ies_ms.subcontrolarea_b sa on f.subcontrolarea_id = sa.id join ies_ms.company_b c on sa.company_id = c.id WHERE b.id = #{equipment_ID} and c.id = #{companyID} and b.Substation_ID != 0

SELECT b.id as equipment_ID, b.Substation_ID as value FROM ies_ms.busbarsection_b b join ies_ms.feeder_b f on b.feeder_id = f.id join ies_ms.subcontrolarea_b sa on f.subcontrolarea_id = sa.id join ies_ms.company_b c on sa.company_id = c.id WHERE b.id = #{equipment_ID} and c.id = #{companyID} and b.Substation_ID != 0

SELECT b.id as equipment_ID, b.Substation_ID as value FROM ies_ms.aclinesegment_b b join ies_ms.feeder_b f on b.feeder_id = f.id join ies_ms.subcontrolarea_b sa on f.subcontrolarea_id = sa.id join ies_ms.company_b c on sa.company_id = c.id WHERE b.id = #{equipment_ID} and c.id = #{companyID} and b.Substation_ID != 0

SELECT b.id as equipment_ID, b.Substation_ID as value FROM ies_ms.powertransformer_b b join ies_ms.feeder_b f on b.feeder_id = f.id join ies_ms.subcontrolarea_b sa on f.subcontrolarea_id = sa.id join ies_ms.company_b c on sa.company_id = c.id WHERE b.id = #{equipment_ID} and c.id = #{companyID} and b.Substation_ID != 0

SELECT b.id as equipment_ID, b.Substation_ID as value FROM ies_ms.generatingunit_b b join ies_ms.feeder_b f on b.feeder_id = f.id join ies_ms.subcontrolarea_b sa on f.subcontrolarea_id = sa.id join ies_ms.company_b c on sa.company_id = c.id WHERE b.id = #{equipment_ID} and c.id = #{companyID} and b.Substation_ID != 0

SELECT b.id as equipment_ID, b.Substation_ID as value FROM ies_ms.serialcompensator_b b join ies_ms.feeder_b f on b.feeder_id = f.id join ies_ms.subcontrolarea_b sa on f.subcontrolarea_id = sa.id join ies_ms.company_b c on sa.company_id = c.id WHERE b.id = #{equipment_ID} and c.id = #{companyID} and b.Substation_ID != 0

SELECT b.id as equipment_ID, b.Substation_ID as value FROM ies_ms.shuntcompensator_b b join ies_ms.feeder_b f on b.feeder_id = f.id join ies_ms.subcontrolarea_b sa on f.subcontrolarea_id = sa.id join ies_ms.company_b c on sa.company_id = c.id WHERE b.id = #{equipment_ID} and c.id = #{companyID} and b.Substation_ID != 0

SELECT b.id as equipment_ID, b.Substation_ID as value FROM ies_ms.splitcompensator_b b join ies_ms.feeder_b f on b.feeder_id = f.id join ies_ms.subcontrolarea_b sa on f.subcontrolarea_id = sa.id join ies_ms.company_b c on sa.company_id = c.id WHERE b.id = #{equipment_ID} and c.id = #{companyID} and b.Substation_ID != 0

SELECT b.id as equipment_ID, b.Substation_ID as value FROM ies_ms.energyconsumer_b b join ies_ms.feeder_b f on b.feeder_id = f.id join ies_ms.subcontrolarea_b sa on f.subcontrolarea_id = sa.id join ies_ms.company_b c on sa.company_id = c.id WHERE b.id = #{equipment_ID} and c.id = #{companyID} and b.Substation_ID != 0

SELECT b.id as equipment_ID, b.Substation_ID as value FROM ies_ms.fuse_b b join ies_ms.feeder_b f on b.feeder_id = f.id join ies_ms.subcontrolarea_b sa on f.subcontrolarea_id = sa.id join ies_ms.company_b c on sa.company_id = c.id WHERE b.id = #{equipment_ID} and c.id = #{companyID} and b.Substation_ID != 0

SELECT b.id as equipment_ID, b.Substation_ID as value FROM ies_ms.pt_b b join ies_ms.feeder_b f on b.feeder_id = f.id join ies_ms.subcontrolarea_b sa on f.subcontrolarea_id = sa.id join ies_ms.company_b c on sa.company_id = c.id WHERE b.id = #{equipment_ID} and c.id = #{companyID} and b.Substation_ID != 0

SELECT b.id as equipment_ID, b.Substation_ID as value FROM ies_ms.compositeswitch_b b join ies_ms.feeder_b f on b.feeder_id = f.id join ies_ms.subcontrolarea_b sa on f.subcontrolarea_id = sa.id join ies_ms.company_b c on sa.company_id = c.id WHERE b.id = #{equipment_ID} and c.id = #{companyID} and b.Substation_ID != 0

SELECT b.id as equipment_ID, b.Substation_ID as value FROM ies_ms.faultindicator_b b join ies_ms.feeder_b f on b.feeder_id = f.id join ies_ms.subcontrolarea_b sa on f.subcontrolarea_id = sa.id join ies_ms.company_b c on sa.company_id = c.id WHERE b.id = #{equipment_ID} and c.id = #{companyID} and b.Substation_ID != 0

SELECT b.id as equipment_ID, b.Substation_ID as value FROM ies_ms.pole_b b join ies_ms.feeder_b f on b.feeder_id = f.id join ies_ms.subcontrolarea_b sa on f.subcontrolarea_id = sa.id join ies_ms.company_b c on sa.company_id = c.id WHERE b.id = #{equipment_ID} and c.id = #{companyID} and b.Substation_ID != 0

SELECT b.id as equipment_ID, b.Substation_ID as value FROM ies_ms.dmstransformer_b b join ies_ms.feeder_b f on b.feeder_id = f.id join ies_ms.subcontrolarea_b sa on f.subcontrolarea_id = sa.id join ies_ms.company_b c on sa.company_id = c.id WHERE b.id = #{equipment_ID} and c.id = #{companyID} and b.Substation_ID != 0

SELECT b.id as equipment_ID, b.Substation_ID as value FROM ies_ms.junction_b b join ies_ms.feeder_b f on b.feeder_id = f.id join ies_ms.subcontrolarea_b sa on f.subcontrolarea_id = sa.id join ies_ms.company_b c on sa.company_id = c.id WHERE b.id = #{equipment_ID} and c.id = #{companyID} and b.Substation_ID != 0

SELECT b.id as equipment_ID, b.Substation_ID as value FROM ies_ms.some_table_b b join ies_ms.feeder_b f on b.feeder_id = f.id join ies_ms.subcontrolarea_b sa on f.subcontrolarea_id = sa.id join ies_ms.company_b c on sa.company_id = c.id WHERE b.id = #{equipment_ID} and c.id = #{companyID} and b.Substation_ID != 0

SELECT b.id as equipment_ID, b.Substation_ID as value FROM ies_ms.some_table_b b join ies_ms.feeder_b f on b.feeder_id = f.id join ies_ms.subcontrolarea_b sa on f.subcontrolarea_id = sa.id join ies_ms.company_b c on sa.company_id = c.id WHERE b.id = #{equipment_ID} and c.id = #{companyID} and b.Substation_ID != 0

SELECT b.id as equipment_ID, b.Substation_ID as value FROM ies_ms.some_table_b b join ies_ms.feeder_b f on b.feeder_id = f.id join ies_ms.subcontrolarea_b sa on f.subcontrolarea_id = sa.id join ies_ms.company_b c on sa.company_id = c.id WHERE b.id = #{equipment_ID} and c.id = #{companyID} and b.Substation_ID != 0
choose.otherwise: SELECT #{equipment_ID} as equipment_id, NULL as value FROM dual WHERE 1 = 0
SELECT NULL as equipment_id, NULL as value FROM dual WHERE 1 = 0
